channel.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Oct 7th, 2022
item.description:
Web3XR

Realms

  • Hyperfy - A platform hosting up to 10,000 customizable, cross-platform, and immersive virtual worlds. Built on three.js, powered by Ethereum.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Jun 27th, 2022
item.description:
Communities

Forums

  • WebXR Community Forum - Official forum for all things WebXR. Sister community to the WebXR Discord.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Jun 19th, 2022
item.description:
Development

Engines

  • Ethereal Enginestars508 - A full stack MMO engine built on three.js and bitECS with support for WebXR.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr May 15th, 2022
item.description:
Art

  • SoulPaint - A VR app that provides you with 3D drawing tools and a virtual body to illustrate lived experiences.

    • Companies and Cooperatives

  • Hatsumi - A design studio developing experiences at the intersection of healthcare and art.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr May 7th, 2022
item.description:
Avatars

  • Exokit Avatarsstars52 - A web-based avatar system that can load humanoid avatars in multiple different model formats and features arm+leg IK, facial animation via visemes, and more. The original repo is no longer maintained, but there is a more up-to-date fork available herestars3.

    • YouTube

  • Sorskoot - Tutorials and other WebXR related content.

    • Content Hubs

  • Extended Collection - Another curation hub for WebXR content maintained by Joseph Simpson.

    • Standout Projects

  • Prehistoric Domain - A Jurassic Park-esque experience in the browser, with multiple dinosaur exhibits available and more planned for the future.

    • Companies and Cooperatives

  • Immers Space - A Distributed Cooperative Organization (DisCO) focused on enabling open and federated immersive web content.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Jan 30th, 2022
item.description:
Standout Projects

  • Plockle - A spatial block puzzle game with over 40 levels.
  • Castle Builder - A collaborative and cross-platform castle-building game utilizing a unique Unity-to-three.js pipeline.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Jan 20th, 2022
item.description:
Communities

Discord

  • WebXR Francophone Discord - French-speaking Discord server for WebXR.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Jan 4th, 2022
item.description:
Companies and Cooperatives

  • Third Axis - A design studio based in NYC that creates 3D, AR, and VR content on the web.

    • Art

  • Obscura - Float around and explore a structure inspired by the architecture of Carlo Scarpa.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Nov 9th, 2021
item.description:
Web3XR

Monetization

  • Zesty Market - A marketplace for rentable NFT banner spaces in XR. As of Nov 9, 2021, has generated over $3K for WebXR developers since July 2021.

    • Communities

    Discord

  • Metaverse Makers Discord - Official server for M3, the Metaverse Makers Mastermind group.
  • Zesty Market Discord - Official server for Zesty Market.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Oct 21st, 2021
item.description:
Communities

Discord

  • XR Foundation Discord - Official server for XR Foundation, responsible for XREngine and various other metaverse-related projects.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Sep 18th, 2021
item.description:
Web3XR

Galleries

  • oncyber - Offers both free and collectible gallery spaces to display NFTs across multiple different chains.

    • Web3XR

    Realms

  • Cryptovoxels - A virtual world powered by Ethereum where players can buy land, build stores, display art, and more.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Sep 17th, 2021
item.description:
YouTube

  • M3 - Official M3 channel.

    • Companies and Cooperatives

  • Playko Software - VR/AR/WebXR agency and WebXR game development studio.
  • Vhite Rabbit - Parent company behind Construct Arcade.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Sep 13th, 2021
item.description:
Communities

Facebook

  • WebXR Korea - Korean WebXR group created by Belivvr.
  • WebXR Paris - Companion to the WebXR Paris group on Meetup.
  • Immersive Web - Oldest WebXR-related group, originally made for WebVR.
  • WebXR - Slightly newer WebXR-centric group.

    • Standout Projects

  • Dudes! - A 3D voxel engine built by Daniel Esteban. Features WebXR support, physics, pathfinding, a multiplayer-enabled VR sculpting mode, and more.

    • Web3XR

    Realms

  • Webaverse - An open-source virtual world powered by Ethereum with support for custom avatars. Focused on digital ownership, an open economy, and interoperability.

    • Art

  • VARTISTE - A VR app for 2D drawing and image editing, and 3D model texturing.

    • Communities

    Discord

  • WebXR Discord - Official Discord server for all things WebXR, with over 1000 members.
  • Wonderland Engine Discord - Wonderland Engine Discord server.

    • Web3XR

    Galleries

  • RareRooms - Allows you to create immersive NFT galleries with support for multiple different chains/marketplaces.

    • Communities

    Forums

  • Babylon.js Forum - Official Babylon.js forum.

    • Development

    Frameworks and Libraries

  • Babylon.js - A powerful and feature-rich rendering engine packaged into a JavaScript framework.
    • Official Documentation

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Sep 12th, 2021
item.description:
Standout Projects

  • Hello WebXR - Made to commemorate the release of the WebXR 1.0 API, showcases some of what's possible with WebXR.

    • Social Spaces

  • Raspberry Dream Land - A progressive WebXR events platform focused on inclusivity, radical self-expression, and virtual relationships.

    • YouTube

  • WebXR - Official WebXR channel.
  • WebXR Summit Series - Contains clips, VODs, and other videos from the WebXR Summit Series.
  • Wonderland Engine - Official Wonderland Engine channel.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Sep 4th, 2021
item.description:
Companies and Cooperatives

  • REM5 - Digital immersive experience design studio specializing in education and social equity initiatives.
  • Active Replica - Offers virtual event hosting through Mozilla Hubs.
  • Active Theory - Developed the Dreamwave platform.
  • Laguna Labs - Immersive web tech agency.

    • E-Commerce

  • Ozone Universe - Virtual enterprise platform for meetings, marketing, and e-commerce.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Aug 17th, 2021
item.description:
Companies and Cooperatives

  • Sketchfab - 3D model marketplace that offers a VR previewer.

    • Social Spaces

  • Emerald City - A virtual event space developed by Hub Culture.

    • E-Commerce

  • VR Cybershop - Virtual storefront for Rebuff Reality.

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Aug 14th, 2021
item.description:
Communities

Reddit

  • r/WonderlandEngine - Wonderland Engine subreddit.

    • Development

    Engines

  • Wonderland Engine - A development platform designed specifically for building WebXR applications.
    • Official Documentation

item.title: msub2/awesome-webxr Aug 4th, 2021
item.description:
Web3XR

Galleries

  • 3XR - A project by microchipgnu that has integrated with Mintbase to create virtual galleries for NFT artwork on NEAR.
  • glry.xyz - A site that hosts virtual galleries for NFT art on the Tezos blockchain.

    • Development

    Frameworks and Libraries

  • react-three-fiberstars19.9k - A React renderer for three.js. Additional WebXR-specific hooks and components are available in React XRstars1.3k as well.
  • Spaces VRstars123 - A front end framework for quickly creating VR websites built on react-three-fiber.
  • A-Frame - Lets you create VR experiences using declarative HTML and custom JavaScript components built on top of three.js.
    • Official Documentation
  • JanusWebstars144 - An in-browser implementation of JanusVR that lets you build social VR experiences.
  • LÖVR - A Lua-based framework that lets you create VR content across web and native platforms.
    • Official Documentation
  • p5.xr - An add-on for the library p5.js that allows you to create immersive p5 sketches.
  • three.js - A JavaScript library for rendering 3D content with WebGL that powers many existing WebXR experiences and tools.
    • Official Documentation

    • Audio

  • beats - A semi-collaborative app with various rooms where anyone can create or modify an existing musical loop.
  • Cybr - Offers a platform for live immersive listening parties. The recorded portions of their first listening party are still available to view.
  • Fathom VR - A WebXR version of the music discovery app Fathom, which lets you search for and explore clouds of related artists with spatialized audio.
  • Helicon - An immersive introduction to polyrhythms.
  • TRACK - A linear ride through an immersive audiovisual experience developed by Little Workshop.

    • Avatars

  • ReadyPlayerMe - Lets you quickly and easily create a 3D avatar online that you can download in glTF format.
  • VRoid - Lets you create anime-styled 3D avatars that export to the highly-compatible .vrm format.

    • Art

  • Brushwork VR - A VR app that simulates the process of painting with a virtual canvas, palette, color mixing, and more.
  • Silk Brush - A port of Tilt Brush to WebXR with plans for future extensions.

    • Communities

    Forums

  • three.js Forum - Official three.js forum.
  • PlayCanvas Forum - Official PlayCanvas forum.

    • Communities

    Reddit

  • r/WebVR - Initially the main subreddit for WebVR discussion, now features general WebXR content along with r/WebXR.

    • Content Hubs

  • 2WSZ - An aggregator for WebXR content featuring ratings, a recommendation system, and both English and Korean language support.
  • Construct Arcade - A curated hub of WebXR games, with games from both outside developers and in-house developers at Vhite Rabbit.
  • XR Swim - An aggregator site for both WebXR and Web3 content.
  • XRSites - An aggregator for WebXR games and experiences.

    • Social Spaces

  • Dreamwave - A web-based platform for hosting scalable virtual events. Powered the virtual music festival Secret Sky 2021.
  • Hubs - Mozilla's platform for enabling users to gather and collaborate virtually.
  • FRAME - A platform focused on enabling easy 3D collaborations in a virtual space.

    • Web3XR

    Realms

  • vrland - A platform for gathering and virtual showcases that supports displaying of NFTs.
  • Somnium Space Web - A web viewer that allows you to explore parcels from Somnium Space in your browser, with VR support on the Oculus Quest browser.

    • Standout Projects

  • Moonrider - A rhythm game built by Supermedium similar to Beat Saber.

    • Learning Resources

  • Learn A-Frame (VR) - A roughly 6-hour Codecademy course written in partnership with A-Frame.
  • babylon.js Guided Learning - Detailed text and video tutorials that complement the other instructional pages in the documentation.

    • Development

    Other

  • Verge3D - A toolkit that allows 3D artists to export their scenes and create immersive web experiences with ease.
    • Official Documentation

    • Development

    Engines

  • Godot - A cross-platform, open-source engine with WebXR support as of version 3.2.4.
    • Official Documentation
  • nunuStudio - A multiplatform, open-source engine built on three.js that can be used natively or in the browser.
    • Official Documentation
  • PlayCanvas - A browser-based WebGL engine with support for WebXR content, mobile browsers, collaborative editing, and more.
    • Official Documentation
  • Unity - A highly popular game engine with community packages that enable content to be exported for WebXR.
    • WebXR Exportstars587 - Exporter by De-Panther
    • SimpleWebXRstars450 - Exporter by Rufus31415
